message:
feat(messaging): consumer config, service obligations, morphism boundary plans, IR cross-ref validation

Major FABRIC messaging expansion replacing stubs with full implementations:

consumer.rs (+835 lines):
- FabricConsumerConfig with durable names, ack/replay/flow-control policies
- ConsumerDispatchMode (Push/Pull), ConsumerReplayPolicy (Instant/Original)
- FabricConsumerState lifecycle: Idle→Active→Paused→Draining→Stopped
- Pull request queue with max_waiting, batch_size, expiry tracking
- Flow-control pause/resume with generation-based resume tokens
- JetStream-compatible ack/deliver policy integration

service.rs (+717 lines):
- ServiceObligation: request/reply lifecycle tracked against ObligationLedger
- ServiceFailure enum with cancel/timeout/reject/overload/transport/app variants
- Transfer chain tracking with ServiceTransferHop records
- reserve_request()/complete()/fail()/transfer() obligation protocol
- ServiceObligationState machine: Reserved→Active→Completed/Failed/Transferred

morphism.rs (+897 lines):
- compile_export_plan()/compile_import_plan() producing verified boundary plans
- MorphismPlanDirection (Import/Export) with step-by-step compilation
- ExportPlan/ImportPlan with certificate, capabilities, reply space selection
- BoundaryStepKind: SubjectRewrite/PayloadTransform/MetadataFilter/CapabilityAttach
- MorphismCompileError with 7 specific failure variants
- crosses_boundary() helper for sharing/class-based boundary detection

ir.rs (+198 lines):
- validate_cross_references() checking service→capability_token references
- ProtocolContract role cross-reference validation against transition targets
- Clippy lint suppressions for struct_field_names, too_many_lines
- Conditional compilation fix: #[cfg(all(test, not(feature = messaging-fabric)))]

session/contract.rs:
- Clippy Self type cleanups (Box<SessionType> → Box<Self>)
- Session type duality: dual() method computing protocol duals
- Depth-limited recursion validation for session types

subject.rs:
- #[must_use] on subscribe(), clippy lint suppressions
- Updated RegistryFamily doc comment for IR independence

cut.rs:
- certify_mobility() now takes &MobilityOperation (pass by reference)

federation.rs:
- Duration::from_secs(60) → Duration::from_mins(1)

class.rs:
- Allow clippy::struct_field_names lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
